parameters.query:
SELECT * FROM job_listing.job_links
WHERE date=$1 AND (audio_added=false OR script_added=false) AND video_created=false
ORDER BY id ASC
LIMIT 1

UPDATE job_listing.job_links
SET video_created = true
WHERE date = '{{ $('Code').item.json.date }}'
  AND video_created = false;

echo "----"

nodes.name: Update Video Details (if video not created)

assignments.name: output
assignments.value: Max epoch reached, update the maxEpoch, or try again the next day

parameters.query:
UPDATE job_listing.mp4_list
SET 
    end_time = '{{ $now.format('HH:mm') }}',
    mp4_name = '{{ $json.filename }}',
    mp4_path = '{{ $json.file_path }}'
WHERE 
    id = {{ $('Code').item.json.id }};

UPDATE job_listing.mp4_list
SET 
    end_time = '{{ $now.format('HH:mm') }}'
WHERE 
    id = {{ $('Save Video Details').item.json.id }};
